case_title: AUTOVEST LLC VS. JOSHUA DAVIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $291.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, JOSHUA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF'S SUMMARY OF CASE IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 200017302) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, JOSHUA $8,577.87 PRINCIPAL, $291.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,869.77, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (CCC 1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 200017302) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (C.C. 1717.5) AND WAIVER OF INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, JOSHUA DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2020
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200000048), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOVEST LLC SERVED SEP-15-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, JOSHUA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200016105) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
